description: This pipeline exports input data via a standard exporter and passes it to an output without making any changes, resulting in a directory containing the generated file(s).

9bf34e3c-8684-4f09-992f-372fc2cd7c78.description: Exports the input data via JIPipe's standard exporter. The output is the directory that contains the generated file(s).

1ab0c8e2-f7ad-4be7-aa01-fa041f7cab5f.description: Passes its input to its output without changes.
